narrative:
North Olmsted-04-C (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 954 registered voters, with 63.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 11.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.6%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 12.8 percentage points.
